action.description:
Introduced by Senators Pfaff, Spreitzer, Wirch, Roys, Ratcliff, Hesselbein, Dassler-Alfheim, Smith, Wall, Carpenter and Larson; 
cosponsored by Representatives Subeck, Stroud, Roe, Kaufert, Wichgers, DeSmidt, Joers, Moore Omokunde, Madison, Clancy, Miresse, Stubbs, Spiros, Sinicki, Rivera-Wagner and Kitchens
